name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Calumet Park, IL Cash America Pawn at 12834 S Ashland Ave offers pawn loans and merchandise sales Mon-Fri 10AM-6PM, Sat 10AM-5PM.
description_long:
Located at 12834 S Ashland Ave in Calumet Park, IL, this Cash America Pawn store provides quick pawn loans and merchandise sales in a convenient South Side location. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 10AM to 6PM, and Saturdays from 10AM to 5PM, with the store closed on Sundays. You'll find a rotating inventory of jewelry, watches, electronics, tools, and other items available for purchase or pawn.

Cash America Pawn in Calumet Park specializes in fast pawn loans on jewelry, electronics, firearms, tools, and similar items. Contact the Calumet Park location at 708-389-6065 to inquire about loan terms, discuss an item you want to pledge, or ask about current merchandise. The team can provide quotes quickly and answer questions about payment options and store inventory.

For Calumet Park residents needing quick cash, this pawn shop offers a fast alternative to traditional loans—bring a valid ID and the item you want to pledge. Most pawn transactions complete in minutes, and you can also browse the store's selection of discounted merchandise. Whether you're looking for immediate cash or a good deal on quality items, the Calumet Park Cash America Pawn location serves the community with reliable service.
address: 12834 S Ashland Ave, Calumet Park, IL 60827

company_info.headquarters: 12834 S Ashland Ave, Calumet Park, IL 60827

pros: 3,300+ store locations across 29 U.S. states plus UK and Latin America ensure broad accessibility
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no additional debt if you default—only lose pledged item
Immediate cash payouts on the spot with no credit check required
Buys and sells wide variety of merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances) providing diverse item options
Specialized gold and precious metals buying service for quick cash conversion
Layaway service with only 10% down payment makes merchandise more accessible
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) suggests operational transparency and financial stability
cons: Pawn loans carry interest charges and are high-cost short-term borrowing compared to traditional credit
Company purchases items at wholesale rates, meaning customers receive significantly less than retail value
Limited to short-term lending secured by physical collateral—not suitable for customers needing unsecured credit or larger loan amounts
Store-dependent model means service quality and merchandise selection vary by location
No mention of financial counseling or education resources to help customers build credit or find alternatives to pawning
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash for emergency expenses who lack access to traditional credit or bank loans
People with items of value (jewelry, electronics, musical instruments) who need fast liquidity without credit evaluation
Cash-constrained consumers seeking short-term loans without credit risk, as non-recourse loans protect against additional debt
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers in genuine financial emergencies who have items of value to pledge and need immediate cash without credit checks or traditional lending approval. The primary caveat is that pawn lending is inherently expensive compared to alternatives like personal loans or credit union PALs—it should be a last resort for short-term needs, not a regular borrowing strategy, and customers should understand they'll receive wholesale rather than retail value for items sold.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property pledges
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold and precious metals buying service
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Cash advance on pledged items with no credit check
Merchandise inventory search and store locator
Non-recourse lending (no additional debt if loan defaults)
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary
Point-of-sale payment solutions for retail merchants
Used and collectible goods retail sales
